ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player in a match */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures achieved by the player in a match */,
  "player_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  "team_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the team's profile picture */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was held */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team A won, Tie) */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the man of the match */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "match_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics are being recorded */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "how_out" TEXT /* Method by which the player was dismissed */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "bowling_figures" TEXT /* Bowling figures of the player (e.g., 5/20) */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., T20, ODI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "overs_per_innings" INTEGER /* Number of overs per innings in this match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue where matches are held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to this role (e.g., view matches, manage teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics are being recorded */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the season */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player in the season */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored by the player in the season */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the season */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player in the season */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures achieved by the player in the season */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., match schedule, score update) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
